## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.5

### 🔔 Notifications
- Moves camera event notifications to a Home Assistant event-bus trigger so motion and AI payload data is available reliably to the blueprint.
- Keeps notification taps pointed at the X-Sense Recordings panel deep link for the selected camera recording.

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Fixes the stale blueprint repair scheduler so it no longer calls `hass.async_create_task` from the wrong thread on newer Home Assistant builds.
- Marks the previous camera notification blueprint copy as stale so Home Assistant can prompt users to refresh imported blueprints.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the X-Sense camera event bus payload used by the blueprint.
- Adds regression coverage for the Home Assistant thread-safe blueprint repair scheduler.
